home_hero_description: A production-ready template combining TanStack Router, Query, and Start with shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS v4, and TypeScript.
home_features_description: Everything you need to start building a production-grade application.
home_getting_started_description: Clone the template and start building.
home_feature_router_description: File-based routing with type-safe navigation, search params, and loader data across client and server.
home_feature_query_description: Server-state management with automatic caching, background refetching, and optimistic updates.
home_feature_typescript_description: End-to-end type safety from the database to the view layer with strict configuration.
home_feature_shadcn_description: Accessible, unstyled primitives with a New York style and zinc color palette.
home_feature_tailwind_description: Utility-first styling with CSS variables for seamless light and dark mode theming.
auth_sign_in_description: Enter your email below to sign in to your account
auth_sign_up_description: Enter your details below to create your account

validation_password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
